title: Conversion-Focused Pricing Experiment for vaos.sh
description: Design and execute a pricing experiment focused on optimizing conversion metrics. Analyze historical conversion data, test different price points, A/B test offer framing, and measure impact on closed_won rate.
objective: Increase conversion rate from proposal_sent/closed_won by optimizing pricing and offer presentation for vaos.sh services.
deliverables: Price elasticity study for AI Ops services
blocking_constraints: Requires access to SVE ledger for conversion data
Requires Stripe integration for payment verification
Requires webhook access for experiment configuration
Requires approval for price changes (no untested pricing modifications without oversight)
soul_commitment: All pricing and revenue optimization experiments will track incremental changes, measure actual impact on closed_won rate and conversion metrics, and require explicit approval before deploying untested pricing changes to production.
